subject: [PATCH v5 4/4] io_uring/rsrc: rename and export IO_IMU_DEST / IO_IMU_SOURCE

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch renames and exports two io_uring flags, IO_IMU_DEST and IO_IMU_SOURCE, to more descriptive names IO_BUF_DEST and IO_BUF_SOURCE. This change is necessary for the io_buffer_register_bvec() path, which requires the buffer to be both readable and writable. The patch updates several files, including include/linux/io_uring_types.h, io_uring/io_uring.c, io_uring/rsrc.c, and io_uring/rsrc.h, to reflect the new flag names and ensure they are exported for use by other subsystems.
